chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2192 of 2014 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Parkash Kumar advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hashim Laghari advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Sangi Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Muhammad Yousuf Rahpoto Assistant AG. ----- The petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this court raising grievance that the Province of Sindh be directed to complete the construction of underpass at Nasim Nagar Chowk Qasimabad within four months. Though almost nine years have been passed but the administrative operation does not pertain to our jurisdiction nor could invent a mechanism for competition of the underpasses or such other construction works which require technical expertise which the court lack. Hence, such kind of grievances cannot be redressed in terms of this petition filed under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973. The petitioner however may pursue such recourse as available to him under the law. The petition being misconceived is dismissed. JUDGE JUDGE
